title: Pension age petition - Jon Trickett
meta_description: A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency
headings: h2: Jon Trickett A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency
h3: Stop any attempts to increase state pension age to 75
text_excerpt: Pension age petition - Jon Trickett Join Get Involved Donate Jon Trickett A strong Yorkshire voice for Hemsworth constituency About Contact Jon in Parliament What Jon Thinks Search Search Twitter Facebook Youtube Pension age petition Former Conservative Department of Work and Pensions Secretary, Iain Duncan Smith MP, recently argued that the state pension age should be increased to 75. This is a disgrace to all hardworking people who have deservedly earned their state pension. Labour is opposed to any increase in the state pension age, and Labour government will set up a commission to review the pension age and examine the possibility of a flexible retirement policy. A Labour government would also guarantee the triple lock pension, and protect your Winter Fuel Allowance and your free bus pass. Please sign this petition to say no to the government ever increasing the state pension age to 75. Stop any attempts to increase state pension age to 75 Name * First Last Email Address * Street Address Address Line 2 City Post Code * I support the Labour Party Yes Consent * I agree to the privacy policy. Your personal information will be kept private and held securely. It will not be shared with any third-party or used for any other purpose than this petition.
